coarse_alignment_reason: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.
chinese_text:
緇衣之宜兮，敝，予又改為兮。適子之館兮，還，予授子之粲兮。
緇衣之好兮，敝，予又改造兮。適子之館兮，還，予授子之粲兮。
緇衣之蓆兮，敝，予又改作兮。適子之館兮，還，予授子之粲兮。
translation_text:
1 How well do the black robes befit you!
When worn out, we will make others for you.
We will go to your court,
And when we return [from it], we will send you a feast!

2 How good on you are the black robes!
When worn out, we will make others for you.
